programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Two newcomers to the competition are challenging reigning North West champion Matt Worswick. Adam Reid is Head Chef for one of the UKs leading culinary talents, and Kim Woodward who made history when she was appointed Head Chef at the Savoy Grill.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the fish course and reigning North West champion Matt Worswick has reason to be confident. However, Kims confident she has got one up on Matt by baking her own black bread unlike Matt whos taking a shortcut.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the main course of the North West Regional heat and the scores mean this is a crucial round. Matt Worswick may be the reigning champion but he is not yet assured of a place cooking for the judges and he is feeling the strain.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the dessert course and the three North West competitors are getting creative, producing some of the most original and stunning desserts. All three chefs are working in a hot kitchen, the tension is palpable, and this time one chef will go home.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two chefs are cooking for judges Matthew Fort, Prue Leith and Oliver Peyton, and guest judge Lady Claire MacDonald OBE. There are stand out dishes from both chefs making it a difficult contest to judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the finest chefs from Wales are competing to be crowned champion. Two chefs are back for a second time: Phil Carmichael, from Cowbridge, South Wales, is Executive Chef at Berners Tavern in London and Adam Bannister, is chef and co-owner of Slice in his home city of Swansea. Adam was crowed Welsh champion last year so this year Phil is back with something to prove. He plans to go home raising the flag for Wales. The third chef is newcomer Andrew Birch, also from Swansea.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the fish course and newcomer Andrew Birch is confident, he is passionate about seafood. He is celebrating the cockle which is harvested near his home city of Swansea. Adam Bannister has created an alter ego, Captain Bannister for his modern take on the old boil in the bag fish dinners and Phil has chosen to revamp the classic prawn cocktail.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Phil Carmichael is serving up his version of an OBE, a refined take on onions, bacon and egg. Adam is planning to serve up Wild boar on a spit, while Andrew turns up the heat when he combines strong Japanese flavours with a traditional roast.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the dessert course and one chef will go home. Phil Carmichael is determined it wont be him but not everything is going to plan when he tackles his Cup of Tea for Maam. One of the accompaniments to his earl grey panna cotta just wont work. He has to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the head to head. The two highest scoring chefs from Wales are cooking for judges Oliver Peyton, Prue Leith and Matthew Fort who are joined by guest judge, blogger and food writer Rosie Birkett.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three newcomers are competing to become regional champion. Daniel Smith, a former head chef for the Roux brothers, now runs his own restaurant in his beloved home county of Norfolk. Andrew Scotts worked with the best in the business, and hes concentrating on telling powerful stories as well as delivering perfect flavours. Danny Gill is a former head chef at Daniel Cliffords two star restaurant Midsummer House.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the fish course and the chefs are using some of the UKs best seafood: lobster, salmon and Cornish crab. Danny Gill is a chef who likes to use the very latest equipment to create the most intense flavours. Hes going to great lengths to maximise the taste of his cucumber consomme and it is causing a lot of interest in the kitchen.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Two chefs are cooking venison. Danny Gill is making a venison wellington, inspired by his Dad, a former RAF chef who has served up Wellington for royalty at many air force banquets. While Andrew Scott has sourced his venison from the Queens Scottish estate, Balmoral.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: This week three chefs from the central region are fighting to be crowned champion. One competitor will go home, only the two highest scoring chefs will make it through to the judging chamber. Danny Gill is facing his toughest day yet, choosing to make a staggering eight elements for his imaginative dessert.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Central regions two highest scoring chefs are cooking for judges Oliver Peyton, Prue Leith and Matthew Fort, for the very first time. Joining them in the chamber is guest judge Enam Ali MBE, a food entrepreneur who set up The British Curry Awards.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the most exciting talents from London and the South East region are competing for a place in the National Finals. Head chef Mark Froydenlund runs Marcus Wareings two star restaurant. Russell Bateman is head Chef at The Grove in Hertfordshire and Ronnie Murray who heads up the Hix Restaurant group.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the fish course and chef Russell Bateman is celebrating the diversity of his beloved home town of London - by combining lobster with jerk spices for an ambitious fish course with seven key elements. Ronnie Murrays taking a risk with an ingredient which is close to the veteran judges heart...and is planning to serve it at three different temperatures warm, deep fried and frozen. And two Michelin starred Mark Froydenlund is planning a novel way to present his dish.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the all-important main course and returning contender Mark Froydenlund is banking on it being his strongest dish. Russell Bateman is creating a beef dish, and Ronnie Murrays mixing a crown of lamb with a curried filling.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the dessert course and the final chance for three of London and South Easts most competitive and talented chefs to get through to the judging chamber, today the veteran judge will send one chef home.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the head to head and the two highest scoring chefs from the London and South East region are cooking for judges Oliver Peyton, Prue Leith and Matthew Fort. Joining this week as guest judge is Kevin Gould, an award winning food writer.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Mini Patel is back for a second attempt at the north east regional title but he is competing against two young newcomers, Tommy Banks and Chris Archer. Last year, Mini went home after the dessert course, so he is hoping to keep better control of his nerves this year.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the fish course and two chefs, Tommy and Mini, have very similar ingredients - both are cooking mackerel. But Mini is trying an original beetroot sorbet while Tommy is using wild woodruff and oyster leaf from his own garden. Chris Archer has chosen the king of the sea, turbot, but there is controversy in the kitchen.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the main course of the north east region and overnight there has been a dramatic development. It is a tough and emotional day for the chefs as they react to the news but they battle on in a bid to present a perfect dish with venison and wagyu-angus beef - the meat of the day.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is a highly emotional day for one of the chefs as he prepares a dish which is inspired by and a tribute to his own great Briton, his late grandfather. But all is not going to plan and the chef ends up making one key element three times in a bid to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two chefs are cooking for judges Matthew Fort, Prue Leith and Oliver Peyton for the very first time. Joining them as guest judge is John Williams MBE, the executive head chef at The Ritz, the only hotel to hold a royal warrant for banqueting.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is Chris McGowans third time however, he is facing tough competition from Mark Abbott, head chef at Daniel Cliffords 2 Michelin star restaurant, Midsummer House, and also from Eddie Attwell who has just completed a year as head chef at Ardtara Country House in Upperlands.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Mark Abbott is pushing himself again plating up a complex fish course of the very finest produce. He is calling it Shellsational but at the last minute he forgets a key element. Returning chef Chris McGowan is refining cod and chips and Eddie Attwell is getting classical with the king of the sea, turbot.The repartee is relentless as the chefs jostle for top place on the leader board. Once again there is plenty of emotion as the veteran chef delivers the scores.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the main course and returning Chef Chris McGowan is feeling confident but part of his dish involves making his own venison sausages to serve with a venison rack, and getting it all done in time is straining his emotions. Eddie Attwell is also serving the meat but with a traditional Northern Irish dish called Dock pudding. Mark Abbott is pushing himself again, he is using wagyu beef and serving it with tongue and corn cooked in a variety of ways.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three chefs from Northern Ireland are cooking their desserts and one chef is on course for a historic score, he could beat his boss - a veteran of GBM - and achieve more marks than anyone has done throughout the history of the competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the head to head. The two highest scoring chefs from Northern Ireland are cooking for judges Oliver Peyton, Prue Leith and Matthew Fort who are joined by guest judge, restaurant critic and Editor-at-Large of the Independent, Amol Rajan.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is the national finals of `Great British Menu. Before cooking starts the eight champions are called to Londons Southbank to get a sight of the prize, the chance to cook at a banquet held at the Palace of Westminster, in celebration of everyday Great Britons honoured by the Queen. It has a huge impact on every one of the chefs, each is determined to do all he can to get a dish to the banquet.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its day two of the national finals, and the eight champions cook their fish courses. This years challenge has been to produce dishes that are a lasting legacy to the New Elizabethan Age. They must showcase the transformation in British cuisine during the Queens historic 64 year reign.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is main course day, the one course every chef wants to cook at the banquet. Judging the chefs dishes are Matthew Fort, Prue Leith and Oliver Peyton and guest judge John Williams MBE, executive chef of The Ritz.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition, and the last chance for the eight champions to get one of their dishes to the banquet for Queen Elizabeth lls Great Britons. Judges Matthew Fort, Prue Leith and Oliver Peyton will judge the dessert course and then decide on the banquet menu to be served at the Houses of Parliament. Joining them in the judging chamber is Grace Dent, restaurant critic, journalist and author.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The winning chefs arrive at the Palace of Westminster to cook for the Banquet of Great Britons. The chefs have been selected because their dishes showcase contemporary British cuisine and demonstrate the transformation in British food during the Queens historic reign.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three chefs meet their surprise veteran judge and cook their summery starters. A dish celebrating childhood summer memories takes on a complicated courgette dish and a technically tricky take on the cucumber sandwich.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The atmosphere in the kitchen gets even more intense as all the chefs take risks with their dishes. Mike Reid, Executive Chef at M Restaurants in London, shocks with when he pairs his fish with some highly unusual flavours.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a smoke filled kitchen as the three chefs prepare their summer themed mains in the hope of impressing the veteran judge. Selin Kiazim is in her element, cooking a feast inspired by the summer barbecues she enjoyed with her family.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: All three chefs are feeling the pressure as they attempt their technical summer desserts. With only the two highest scorers going through to tomorrows regional final, who will be sent home?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: All three chefs are feeling the pressure as they attempt their technical summer desserts. With only the two highest scorers going through to tomorrows regional final, who will be sent home?

programme.title: Destination Haunted
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Corine Carey, Leanne Sallenback, and Kelly Ireland travel to San Antonio, Texas to answer the panicked calls of local residents who have experienced paranormal phenomena tied to the infamous Battle of the Alamo in 1836.

programme.title: The Rise of Napoleon Bonaparte A Military Prodigy
programme.desc: Napoleon Bonaparte, born in 1769 in Corsica, came from minor nobility and claimed Roman heritage.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: Hitler and Goebbels begin a pogrom night against the Jews; Hitler sets up a secret life in Obersalzberg and conceals his mistress Eva Braun from the public eye.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: Hitler breaches the Munich Agreement and claims further territories for Germany.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: An exploration of Hitlers life, his political manoeuvres, and his rise to power during World War II.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: Hitler forgoes his pact with Stalin and invades Russia with the mission to destroy the whole population and gain land in Eastern Europe for his supreme race.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: An exploration of Hitlers life, his political manoeuvres, and his rise to power during World War II.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: Hitlers military decisions grow more catastrophic and the fronts break apart; the Allies defeat the Italian and German troops under Rommel in Africa, and land in Normandy but Hitler refuses to accept defeat.

programme.title: The Hitler Chronicles
programme.desc: Hitler refuses to accept defeat until the Russians stand 500 metres from the bunker of the Reichskanzlei.

programme.title: Hitler: The Rise To Power
programme.desc: Hitlers rise to dictatorship was shaped by key events, supporters, and public sentiment.

programme.title: Churchills War
programme.desc: Historian David Irving presents footage and recordings of Winston Churchills speeches urging Britons to battle the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: The triumphs of the Prime Minister who led England through its darkest hour and on to victory.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: A look at how mechanised warfare aided Germanys advance into France; a look at the way commando raids, blitzkrieg, mobile desert warfare, and amphibious landings changed warfare.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: The battles of World War II increase in sheer size of the forces involved as well as the power of their weapons; a look inside Germanys strategies for Operation Barbarossa, as they attempt to invade the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: A wide variety of strategies are needed during World War II, as battles are fought in every continent in many different landscapes; the English are cut-off at Dunkirk following unstoppable Nazis tearing through Western Europe.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: Battles are almost always about gaining territory, and advancing the front line to seize the port, the city, the oil field, or another objective; in the bombed remains of Stalingrad, Germany, soldiers are sentenced to death or held captive.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: New tactics are born in every war, to try to influence the course of battles. Campaigns are waged against non-military targets to ruin morale; long battles rage throughout the war, from Guadalcanal in the Pacific, to the brutal siege at Leningrad.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: World war involves many actions, large and small. Forces, climate, geography, and problems of supply must all be managed; Japan gathers naval strength for an attack on Midway Island as they attempt to lure the United States into a trap.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: In every battle lies victory and defeat, decided by strategy and which side is better able to manage resources. The battles won and lost determine the outcome of World War II.

programme.title: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: In every battle lies victory and defeat, decided by strategy and which side is better able to manage resources. The battles won and lost determine the outcome of World War II.

programme.title: How The Battle Of Britain Was Won
programme.desc: In 1948, the RAFs skill and tech, with the first air defense system, triumphed over the Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Marden Henge: The communal sweat lodges and feasting remains that illuminate the lost rituals of Stonehenge. Durotriges: A glimpse into the bizarre animal sacrifice rituals offered to their gods by a mysterious Celtic tribe of the first century BC.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: In rough water, salvors scramble to retrieve a cruise ships anchor lost at sea - but they have to find it first.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Crews work around the clock to build the worlds largest underwater concrete bed to salvage the Costa Concordia. Operating in secrecy, teams work under high security to repair one of the worlds most iconic cruise liners.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Rick and Beau discover a variety of intriguing items as they search the rough waters of the River Tees for lost Tudor relics.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Deep Sea Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The quest continues in the Red Sea off the coast of Egypt, a deeply personal journey given Ross grandfather fought in the North Africa campaign during World War II.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of his two cousins that died at sea in WWII, Ross Kemp explores captured German scout warship, the F2 and brings up treasure that could link back to his relatives.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The Kaiser Sunken Fleet: Ross Kemp continues his adventure in Scapa Flow, plunging down on the wrecks of a German warship and an experimental submarine aircraft called the M2. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross Kemp dives down on shipwrecks to uncover hidden stories, and recover treasure. He dives on warships, experimental submarines, early slaver ships and Napoleonic frigates, searching for clues and artefacts that reveal the story behind every wreck.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: After hearing about his great-grandfather who served in the Merchant Navy, Ross Kemp is inspired to explore the wreck of a WWII cargo ship and try to recover its military supplies.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Deep Sea Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross heads to Portsmouth and the Mary Rose Museum and takes up an opportunity he cant turn down, to be one of the few divers allowed on the site of Britains most famous wreck, the Mary Rose.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Deep Sea Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross hops round the coast from Portsmouth to Plymouth, then on to the Gulf of Suez. A bout of hypercapnia leaves Ross shaken after the dive of a 17th century shipwreck.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts looks around a semi in Northern Ireland and a flat in Newcastle, while Lucy Alexander has a look at a basement flat in Dover which boasts a stunning view.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander meets a couple who buy an old prefab in the New Forest and hope to knock it down and build their dream home. Martin Roberts meets a man who breaks a property developers rule and buys a flat on an impulse.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander looks at a derelict house in Surrey where the new owners plan to build four houses, and Martin Roberts meets a novice developer in Crewe and a couple of seasoned professionals in Cheshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets plumber Amy who does a fantastic job renovating a cottage in a Cornish village. Also, two sets of farmers, in Cumbria and Northern Ireland, both hoping to make money on property developing projects.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy travel the country from the South East to the North East, dropping in on Northern Ireland too. The properties are just as different as the regions from a bungalow and a terraced house to a unique water tower.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin meets a father and son building team working on a large semi in Derbyshire and a mother and daughter in Belfast doing up a four-bed terrace, and Lucy looks around a more modest one-bedroom flat in Clydebank in Scotland.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy look around two terraced houses and a large semi in the Midlands and the North East. Theres a rush on with one of the projects - a couple want to turn their auction lot into the perfect family home before their second baby arrives.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy see two very different terraced houses in Lynemouth and Belfast and a bungalow in Derby which a couple plan to make their forever home.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy visits a former travel agency in Folkestone in Kent, Martin follows the work of renovating a rundown community centre in Dunfermline in Scotland, and we meet a family that are fixing up a fire damaged terrace in Carlisle.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A retired navy man and his family renovate a flat in Port Glasgow while developers in Derbyshire and Kent try and make money on their terraced houses.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a tiny rundown flat in Chelsea and Lucy visits terraced houses in Dover and Sandbach.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy meets a couple who have been on the show before and are now renovating a flat in Raynes Park, and Martin visits a two-bed terrace in Twechar in Scotland and a semi-detached house in Chesterfield.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander are in London, the south coast and the Welsh Valleys looking around three very different properties that were sold at auction.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look round two terraced houses and a large semi in the Midlands and the north east. A couple want to do their auction lot up and turn it into their perfect family home before their second baby arrives.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.desc: When a woman meets a marine, they fall in love and start a life together. This perfect façade hides a dirty double life of drugs and deceit.

programme.title: Fatal Affairs

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: An unthinkable crime cuts short a family mans quest for a better life in Florida. To find the culprit, detectives must unravel a deadly web of deception woven long before the killer ever took aim.

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: A religious community mourns an elderly couple after they turn up viciously murdered in their home; in a race to capture the killer, investigators discover that their deaths weave into a larger web of lies and wicked desires.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company
programme.desc: For a group of resort employees, the isolated mountain where they work is anything but paradise when one of them goes missing. Is there a killer amongst them?

programme.title: Murder Chose Me

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: When Lanny Horwitz is found murdered in his own home, it unleashes a shocking tale of jealousy and infidelity, leaving every member of the family a suspect.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Angel Garcia disappears after riding his dirt bike, friends say he was chased by an SUV before he vanished. Months later, a possible sighting raises hopes.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Kayla Berg isnt home after a night out, her loved ones think shes staying with friends. After six days, her last known location raises suspicion.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: When law enforcement finds local electrician James Nibbe dead after a home invasion, they must dig beneath the surface of Lake Crystal, Minnesota, to root out the killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller dont suspect that the man terrorising their city could be a member of their own family. When they realise that their son hides a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: An unidentified woman is found callously murdered in an off-campus apartment; police have no leads on the case until her terrified neighbour shares a chilling story.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Natalia Grace: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Natalia desperately seeks refuge with Vince and Nicole DePaul to escape the grip of her manipulative adoptive parents, Cynthia and Antwon Mans.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Natalia Grace: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Natalia escapes her manipulative parents, Cynthia and Antwon, but their grip on her remains strong; Nicole fears that, despite the escape, Natalia might be pulled back into the Manses fold.

programme.title: The Real Murders on Elm Street
programme.desc: Detectives discover a young mans body hidden in a rubbish bin during a street festival. With few leads to go on and suspects everywhere, the police are not sure who they can trust and who might be the next victim.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A frantic graduate student calls 911 to say she just shot her boyfriend, a 29-year-old attorney, in self-defense. Police soon discover that her story doesnt add up and realise they are face-to-face with a remorseless, calculating psychopath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Victoria and Christine Lisowski live in fear of their mother, Sungnam Kwon-Lisowski. They never imagine that this Christmas, theyll feel lucky to survive the holiday and their mothers crazed vengeance.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A young woman makes a frantic 911 call about a brutal home invasion that results in the shooting of her mother and father. As police interview her, they uncover a secret double life and an elaborate web of lies spun by a maniacal psychopath.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A lone gunman shoots a young man and woman on their way home from the gym where they work. While interrogating a suspect, detectives learn that this is no random attack but the twisted plan of a deranged psychopathic stalker.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan at Manor Farm are Penny Lancaster and Olympic gymnast Max Whitlock to provide the chat - garden designer Chris Hull beckons in the Year of the Horse with a showstopping display of plants in honour of the Chinese New Year, we rub shoulders with the great and the good as we step into the world of competitive polo, and Jonathan Phang combines his passion for delicious artisanal produce with creative flair and genial hospitality as he provides the perfect vessel for a midday snack.

programme.title: Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue is joined by actor Sophie Winkleman, who admits to loving pies - Prue therefore makes her a chicken pie using hot water crust pastry while Sophie tells Prue how much fun she has making drama for radio. Prue then makes an oxtail stew and Dumplings and serves it with frozen mashed potato - meanwhile, John heads out to the garden to catch up with gardener Philippa, who is pruning a flowerbed, and tells us about a new fruit cage that has been installed to protect their latest plants.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.desc: Brichon shows us her crib, complete with two movie theaters, and Aishah takes us on a tour of her haunted hotel.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Briana faces DeVoin as she heals from surgery. After a disheartening doctors visit, Leah receives an update on Alis condition. Adam violates his visitation agreement and Barb responds to Jenelles road rage encounter.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn comes face to face with Javis pregnant girlfriend, and Chelsea readies Aubree for her first visit with Adam at the Center. Briana tells DeVoin to move out, and Jenelle and Nathan square off.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordans pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one. At a time when she needs support, the most important people in her life are only adding stress.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys. With both sides refusing to speak to one another, Jennifer is forced to make a choice between the people she loves most to get the support she desperately needs.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Raised by a single mother, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. After getting pregnant, she struggles to mould her irresponsible boyfriend into the doting father she never had.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: After following in her mothers footsteps by becoming a `Teen Mom, Danielle struggles to prove that she can do things differently. Moving in with her boyfriend, Danielle learns that finishing school, getting a job and raising a baby are going to be impossible without some help.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Regarded as the most likely to succeed in her family, Cleondra shocks everyone by getting pregnant so young. Now she must face the tough decision to leave the comfort of her own home and move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: When Kristina met Faith in a chatroom, she didnt intend to fall in love and betray her IRL fiance. Now, Nev and co-host Tallulah Willis navigate a treacherous love triangle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Alfreds thirsty to find Adonis, the man of his dreams. But as they dig for answers, word that Nev and Kamie are in town leads to the most explosive confrontation in Catfish history!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chanelle is the light Michael needed in his life, but out of the blue shes disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Aaron has secretly fallen for Treyvon while also engaged to his fiance! As the wedding approaches, Aaron turns to Nev and Kamie for help. Is Treyvon actually the man of his dreams? And what will his fiance do when he finds out?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Deonn credits Lanise for making him a better man in the two years theyve been dating, but he never can get her to meet up IRL! Deonn begs Nev and Kamie for help, but as they dig, they uncover more dirt than Deonn is expecting.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Joe was skeptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and that he also might have found love with her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Young Reign fell fast for Piers, forming a deep connection after meeting in an anime fandom group. Now, 7 years later, after a long absence, Piers is back in her DMs! Reign enlists the help of Nev and Kamie to find Piers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Helping Keontae discover whether Tylers sexual identity is the only thing he is hiding.

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: From Flottay to Sanday: War and Peace in the North

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Paper conservator Louise Drover rescues a water-damaged pastel portrait of a young couple. It is a delicate task for Louise as she uses more moisture to tackle the stubborn water stain. Mechanical maestro Steve Fletcher takes receipt of a 1950s toy rocket that once had sparks.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First to arrive is a dilapidated nursing chair dating back over 100 years. The button-back antique reminds owner James of the wonderful times he spent with his grandmother and mother as a child. With generations of his family having been nursed on the chair, the wooden frame is now completely broken.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Camera restorer Brenton West tackles a vintage pocket camera, believed to have taken the final photo of a loving family before they dispersed following their mothers death. programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Wood whizz Will Kirk takes on the huge responsibility of restoring a model ship, carefully handcrafted out of matchsticks by a beloved father who died when his children were still small. This is one of the only possessions that owner Lesley has from her dad who she lost when she was just seven. It is a painstaking job for Will, who leaves Lesley truly overwhelmed with his meticulous repair.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The team restores four precious heirlooms, including a shattered ceramic poppy for a war veteran, which was created for the art installation at the Tower of London to commemorate the centenary of WW1, and a 1950s hot towel machine passed down a Cypriot family of barbers. programme.desc: In rural Missouri, the body of a young woman lies dead on a deserted dirt road only days before her wedding; while investigating her death, police uncover surprising secrets in her fiances life.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: The murders of two teen girls at a remote and scenic lookout point seem random until police uncover a web of secrets among their network of friends.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: A landlord in Birmingham, Ala., approaches his rental home to inspect a broken window when he suddenly hears a baby crying, but what he discovers inside will haunt two families for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In 2021, when 33-year-old Erika Verdecia goes missing, her family launches their own search for her. What their homegrown investigation uncovers is a tragic trail of bloodshed, 36 years in the making.

programme.title: The Friday the 13th Murders
programme.sub-title: We All Go a Little Mad
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, police find a family dead in their mansion. A horror film flickers. A bloody mask lies nearby. And a letter to the victims mother - the voice of the demon in The Exorcist - hints at something darker than murder-suicide.

programme.title: The Friday the 13th Murders
programme.desc: After a call on Friday the 13th, Jose Herran vanishes; when investigators dig into the town he disappeared into, they uncover something monstrous; fear is currency, pain is ritual, and some visitors never leave; horror here doesnt hide - it thrives.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Stephanie Powell-Andersons convenience store shift ends in bloodshed, as part of a larger pattern of violence plaguing the area; with the assailant growing bolder by the day, the heat is on to make an arrest before he kills again.

programme.desc: Looking at the phenomenon of high-profile criminal cases where people publically claim they are innocent about a crime they have committed.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When an employee at an armoured van company receives a call about a money shipment that did not arrive, an FBI search for the missing van begins.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Shannon Sanderson was abducted after a successful night at the casino and police discovered she had been stalked and attacked for her $5,000 winnings.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Masked gunmen robbed an armoured car facility in LA, and made off with $18.9 million. With only one piece of physical evidence, a fragment of a vehicle tail light, the FBI hoped to connect a former employee to the crime.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: When Peggy Perez-Olivo is shot in the head her husband Carlos insists they were victims of carjackers. The horror that follows will shock even experienced investigators.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Police in Wisconsin are stunned to find an elderly couple brutally killed in their home. When family start to receive death threats, will murder strike again?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: In 1988, a couple are shot in their home, but husband Dan Montecalvo survives. The investigation uncovers a scheming killer who nearly got away with the perfect murder.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Raquel Calderin, a 42-year-old mother in Miami, vanishes without a trace on her way home from work. The investigation leads detectives into a disturbing family picture.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder

programme.title: The Perfect Murder

programme.title: La Traviata
programme.desc: OperaGlass Works reinvents La Traviata as a film with a diverse cast, stunning dancers and a fresh, lively take on the classic opera.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran Fred Pearson is a broken man after years of punishment from his sergeant. But years later, he gets his chance for revenge.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Best Chess Player in the World
programme.desc: To prove he is a gifted chess player, a man explains how he planned the perfect murder after discovering his wife was unfaithful.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Three men are being blackmailed by a woman for money. One day she is found murdered and the three worry that they will be suspected. Her chauffeur, however, has a plan.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A successful writer is being hounded by the feminist movement over his books. If only he was at home with his wife everything would be all right. Wouldnt it?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A driver picks up a hitchhiker before hearing on the radio that a serial killer is on the loose. Is the man sitting next to him in the passenger seat the killer?

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: The well-to-do wife (Teresa Wright) of a bigamist will go to any lengths to have her husband all to herself.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A man (Leslie Nielsen) takes his son to a magic shop on his birthday and watches as the store owner makes the boy vanish.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes in Washington
programme.desc: The master detective travels to America on the trail of a matchbook cover containing missing microfilm. The book is passed from person to person, eventually ending up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Haunting and powerful screen adaptation of Emily Brontes story of the tragic love affair between the enigmatic Heathcliff and the headstrong daughter of his adoptive family.

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Pitching easels and priming canvases to find out who is the Landscape Artist of the Year. Hopeful contestants try to paint their way to a life-changing cash prize in various locations across the country.

programme.title: Kate Bush, the Timeless Genius
programme.desc: Kate Bush broke new ground in pop music with her poetic and radical otherness. Looking back at her career, giving a voice not only to the musician herself, but also to all those she continues to inspire today.

programme.title: David Bowie: A Reality Tour
programme.desc: David Bowie performs tracks spanning his 30-plus years in the business at Point Theatre in Dublin in 2003 as part of a worldwide tour in support of his Reality album.

programme.title: Elvis: Summer of 56
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the pivotal year in Elviss journey to rock `n roll fame. Featuring his controversial TV appearances, spectacular performances, newsreel clips and interviews.

programme.title: When Elvis Met Priscilla
programme.desc: It was a classic tale of boy meets girl, but in this case, the boy was the most famous star in the world. Elvis and Priscillas journey is one imbued with love but also controversy and turbulence. This is the story of when Elvis met Priscilla.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Early Years
programme.desc: Uncover Elvis Presleys journey from Tupelos poverty to worldwide fame. Through highs and lows, witness the rise of the King, a tale of passion, perseverance, and the birth of rock and roll.

programme.title: Elvis: Tortured Soul
programme.desc: Elvis Presley captured the hearts of millions through his chart-topping music and untouchable charisma. However, behind the gates of Graceland, the King faced battles on several fronts that threatened his career, his love and even his life.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Arguably the first supergroup, Cream featuring Ginger Baker, Jack Bruce, Eric Clapton, lyricist Pete Brown, artist and lyricist Martin Sharp, producer Felix Pappalardi and legendary engineer Tom Dowd, achieved massive worldwide success and ensured their place in rocks hall of fame with `Disraeli Gears in 1967. With interviews musical demonstration, acoustic performance and archive footage.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix: The Guitar Hero
programme.desc: Jimi Hendrix the master of electric guitar, as told by a selection of the worlds greatest musicians.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix: The Guitar Hero
programme.desc: Jimi Hendrix the master of electric guitar, as told by a selection of the worlds greatest musicians.

programme.title: Yes, Madam
programme.desc: A relentless inspector and a Scotland Yard detective investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: Battle-scarred stuntman Colt Seavers springs back into action when a movie star suddenly disappears. As the mystery deepens, he soon finds himself ensnared in a sinister plot that pushes him to the edge of a fall more dangerous than any stunt.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Drunken Master II
programme.desc: Chinese and British agents go after a martial artist who has unwittingly come into possession of a stolen imperial seal.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars
programme.desc: Sergio Leones classic about a mysterious drifters involvement with two families, the Baxters and the Rojos, in a Mexican border town. Instead of leaving town, the drifter gets caught up in the feud and plays both sides of the warring factions and gets rich in the bargain.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: Neo and the rebel leaders estimate that they have 72 hours until Zion falls under siege to the Machine Army. Only a matter of hours separates the last human enclave on Earth from 250,000 Sentinels programmed to destroy mankind. The citizens of Zion rest all manner of hope and expectation on Neo, who finds himself stalled by disturbing visions as he searches for a course of action.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as theyre pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venoms home world.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: As the machines power towards Zion to put an end to human resistance, Morpheus and his crew race back to make one last stand, and Neo takes on Agent Smith once more. Will Neos new powers be enough to beat Agent Smiths replicate programme?

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kravens complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: Blacklight
programme.desc: Travis Block, a shadowy government agent who specializes in removing operatives whose covers have been exposed, uncovers a deadly conspiracy within his own ranks that reaches the highest echelons of power.

programme.title: Blacklight
programme.desc: Travis Block, a shadowy government agent who specializes in removing operatives whose covers have been exposed, uncovers a deadly conspiracy within his own ranks that reaches the highest echelons of power.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! and DC Super Hero Girls: Mayhem in the Multiverse
programme.desc: The Super Hero Girls and the Teen Titans reluctantly band together to fight a new threat to the universe.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A placid small town is brought to its knees by an infestation of destructive small creatures with a vicious sense of humour.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Two childhood friends get caught up in with the mob in New York and find themselves forced to travel to Australia to deliver $50,000. Their trouble really starts when they reach the outback, and a kangaroo bounds away with the cash.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss; she cant remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective, and Henry must convince them that hes in it for love.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her sons science teacher.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, `The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Cloughs 44 day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club. England, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revies tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Pearce.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: When his fathers job results in a family move to the countryside, young German boy Bruno misses his old friends. Roaming the grounds of the large country house he now calls home, he discovers the huge fenced facility that his dad Ralf, a Nazi officer, now manages. Approaching it, Bruno meets Shmuel, a fellow youngster on the other side of the barbed wire, wearing what appears to be a pair of pyjamas.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Goring.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Two adopted brothers and rival dancers are thrust together when they are both invited to audition for the World Breaking Championships.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Volcanologist Trevor Anderson journeys into the Earths core after discovering evidence that the famous authors story was based on fact. Accompanied by his teenage nephew Sean and fellow scientist Hannah, Trevor is soon coming face-to-face with an astonishing and extremely perilous hidden world.

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: A Dogs Purpose
programme.desc: Reincarnated as different dogs over the course of five decades, a lovable and devoted canine keeps reuniting with the original owner who cared for it as a golden retriever puppy.

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: A thrilling modern day take on Charles Dickens novel, `Oliver Twist, as a gang of street hustlers plan the heist of the century.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April ONeil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: After returning to his Hawaiian home, a soldier takes a job with a tourist bureau against the advice of his parents.

programme.title: Hatari!
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventure tale set on an East African animal reserve, where a group of trappers catches animals for zoos. The macho spirit of the all-male group is upset by the arrival of a seductive photographer, who captures the heart of the head trapper.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A teen suffers the pain of adolescence as she longs for Mr. Right while fending off the advances of the class clown.

programme.title: Alfie
programme.desc: In London during the swinging sixties, a promiscuous Cockney lad who lacks purpose or direction habitually seduces women and then moves on. When one of his girlfriends becomes pregnant, he refuses to marry her, preferring instead to carry on with more conquests, but eventually something happens which forces him to reconsider his shallow existence.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: After a one-night stand, a couple decide to get married. However, it turns out to be a rocky road when both parties have to compromise their own cultural traditions.

programme.title: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: A writer is trying to fly from New York to Savannah, Georgia, where he is due to be married in two days time. However, the plane crashes during take-off and the writer inadvertently saves the life of one of his fellow passengers, a free-spirited woman. She then accompanies him as he tries to continue his journey by rental car, train and bus - but he is beset by one disaster after another.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Mildreds world is turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, comes back to look after her and takes her camping to find the mythological Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of the Jurassic World theme park, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing return to the island of Isla Nublar to save the remaining dinosaurs from a volcano thats about to erupt. They soon encounter terrifying new breeds of gigantic dinosaurs, while uncovering a conspiracy that threatens the entire planet.

He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.desc: Declassified files related to President Kennedys assassination in a far larger context, aiming to shine more light on what really happened in 1963.

programme.title: The Yardbirds

programme.title: 2000 Meters to Andriivka
programme.desc: A Ukrainian platoon attempts to liberate a strategic village from Russian forces. A journalist joins them, observing the impacts of war and growing doubts about its resolution.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Come Inside My Mind

programme.title: Everton, Howards Way
programme.desc: The definitive story of Everton at the peak of their powers in the mid-1980s, when they became the best side in the land. They won the FA Cup, thrashed Man Utd 5-0, beat Liverpool home and away, and then strolled to the league title with a record amount of points. This is the tale of a man with Everton in his blood and a team intent on greatness, all told by the heroes who helped make it history.

programme.desc: In Odiham, Hugh Dennis and the team search for the house of the head of the Elizabethan Secret Service, Sir Frances Walsingham. With very little to go on, our team want to locate the house, work out its size, and what Walsingham may have used it for.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient emperors, kings and pharaohs were often attributed with otherworldly strengths, abilities and wisdom, and many were even considered gods by the people they ruled. Who were these exceptional leaders?

programme.desc: Accounts from various cultures describe similar divine, birdlike figures that brought advanced medical knowledge to mankind thousands of years ago. Who were these ancient surgeons?

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.desc: American paratroopers are dropped behind German lines on D-Day in order to secure territory behind the beaches.

programme.title: The Great British Dig: History in Your Back Garden
programme.desc: Hugh and the team uncover a Victorian mill that was converted into a prisoner of war camp during World War II. Located under a housing estate in Oldham, Greater Manchester, Glen Mill once housed over six thousand enemy prisoners.

programme.title: The Great British Dig: History in Your Back Garden
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and the team go on the hunt for the Morda Workhouse in Oswestry, Shropshire, to find out what the conditions were really like there. Hugh also visits Llanfyllin Workhouse, where he takes some hard labour like the inmates would have done.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Edinburghs handsome hilltop bastion is Scotlands most popular paid tourist attraction. With a slew of sieges to its name, it is no surprise that the site boasts some formidable defences, and Dan puts one heavy duty cannon through its paces.

programme.title: Ramses: The Great King Of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Ramsses, known as Ramsses-great-in-victories, achieved divine status. His fame reached far beyond national borders. As pharaoh he acquired unprecedented power and prestige, making him considered a living god.

programme.title: Pharaohs at War
programme.desc: Cleopatra attempts to restore the power of the early pharaohs through alliances with the most powerful men in the world. Her clash with Octavian at the battle of Actium leads to the rise of an emperor.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: In 2011, archaeologists find a previously undiscovered tomb in the Valley of the Kings; inside are a mummy, rubble and a coffin that appears to be younger than the tomb; investigation reveals the tale of a lost princess from Egypts golden age.

programme.title: Egypts Unexplained Files
programme.desc: An exploration of crime and punishment in ancient Egypt filled with homicidal royalty, rampant tomb raiding and acts of extreme punishment.

programme.desc: Tasked with guarding concentration camps, the actions of the SS Death Head Unit knew no bounds, and, despite their heinous acts, still attended social gatherings.

programme.desc: Hitler appears to be eliminated after his failed putsch in 1923. Discover how the Nazi movement used democracys tolerance in Germany to come back.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions

programme.title: Truthseekers
programme.desc: With unimaginable wealth and power, Cleopatra was the most important woman of her time. Yet, the tomb of the most famous woman of the ancient world has still not been found.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
